calendar.matters:
Petition Pursuant To Cal. Probate Code 850 A 3 A And 850 B; Request For Statement Of Decision; Objection To Hearsay And Out Of Court Evidence: And Requesy For Evidentiary Hearing And Trial
Off Calendar May-20-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernesto Sanchez appeared via zoom for Lottie Wima Wong (petitioner).

Mr. Sanchez stated that they would like to take the 850 petition off calendar without prejudice and proceed with a Civil Quite Title action.

The matter is ordered off calendar without prejudice.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition Pursuant To Cal. Probate Code 850 A 3 A And 850 B; Request For Statement Of Decision; Objection To Hearsay And Out Of Court Evidence: And Requesy For Evidentiary Hearing And Trial
Off Calendar Apr-22-2026 Continued To May-20-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Logan Walter appeared via zoom for Lottie Wong (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding set petition before the court, that whether this is an 850 petition or a quick claim matter, That the real property belongs to petitioners as a successor trustees of their own individual trusts, that this is possibly an adverse possession claim.

The Court shall provide a brief continuance for further discussion on this matter.

The matter is continued to May 20, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition Pursuant To Cal. Probate Code 850 A 3 A And 850 B; Request For Statement Of Decision; Objection To Hearsay And Out Of Court Evidence: And Requesy For Evidentiary Hearing And Trial
Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Continued To Apr-22-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Logan Walker appeared via zoom for Lottie Wong (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding determination The subject real property belongs to petitioners as the successor trustees, that This matter may potentially be a civil matter filed under a Quite Title, and that counsel to provide further briefing on this matter.

The matter is continued to April 22, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel to file the further briefing 5 days prior to the next hearing.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

Petition Pursuant To Cal. Probate Code 850 A 3 A And 850 B; Request For Statement Of Decision; Objection To Hearsay And Out Of Court Evidence: And Requesy For Evidentiary Hearing And Trial
Off Calendar Feb-25-2026 Continued To Mar-25-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The matter is continued to March 25, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
